response: the sacred verses of siriragau mahala 3 speak of the spirit that is found through devotion and the grace of the guru - the path of bhakti is only possible with the guidance of the guru - the soul is purified when it merges with the self - the true word of the divine is the path to enlightenment - gene of the divine is passed through the sacred language of the scriptures - visit the holy places to feel the presence of the divine - the language of the heart is the language of the spirit - the spirit is awakened through the grace of the guru - the divine is the source of all creation - the soul is united with the divine through the path of devotion - the sacred language is the key to the divine truth - the spirit is transformed through the divine word - the visit to the holy places is a step towards spiritual awakening - the sacred language is the means to connect with the divine - the spirit is guided by the divine will - the gene of the divine is found in the heart of the devotee - the language of the soul is the language of the spirit - the visit to the holy places is a way to connect with the divine - the spirit is united with the divine through the path of devotion - the sacred language is the key to the divine truth - the gene of the divine is found in the heart of the devotee - the spirit is awakened through the grace of the guru - the divine is the source of all creation -
